target: We will soon arrive at Hitogashima Island.

Young man…!
We should have never met before, but…
W-Why… do you know my identity?!

(In Wakayama City, Wakayama Prefecture,
floating in the Kii Channel is 'Hitogashima Island'.
The island you can see behind us is Awaji Island)
(I'm returning to this hometown after two years…)

(Nah, it's my hometown so of course…
But something about this feels like just recently…)

(That guy is Nagumo-sensei too…
Why do I know that…?)

Welcome back, Shin-chan!!
Long journey, you must be exhausted!!!

Hey, Shinpei!!
Finally came back!
After two years right??

(…Safe?
Wait… why am I so happy right now?)

Hey Sou…
Why did I come back?

You got a message from Ushiyo right?! 
She called yesterday!!
If you don't come back this year, she'll kill me!

Shin-chan. Why did you come directly here?
Didn't your house have someone waiting for you already?

My parents are out of town.
No one's home today anyway…

You don't say that!
You must have wanted to see your sister as soon as possible, right??

H-Huh!?
That's not it at all!!

Hey!
You've grown so much in just a little while!!!
Did you make up with Ushiyo?

Since Shinpei went to Tokyo,
it's been a cold war situation all this time.

"Come back for summer vacation,
or I'll drag you all the way from Tokyo!"
Yeah, it even reached my room.

"Go to Tokyo and grab her by the neck,
then drag her back on the Tokaido!"

That's scary!
Ushiyo would do that for sure, so it's even more terrifying!!

Be careful Shin-chan.
My sister…
She said she'd hit you for sure when we meet.

Huh, she isn't around…
Where did she go?
(I thought Ushiyo might actually come to Tokyo if I didn't return--)
(But the main reason I came back was--)

(I wanted to see her face again,
but it felt like I'd never be able to…)
(Just once more… I wanted to see her face…)
